mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_uav(uav_code, model, manufacturer, max_payload, max_altitude, max_flight_time, max_speed, wingspan, weight, status, remark, ai_generated, deleted) VALUES(#{uavCode}, #{model}, #{manufacturer}, #{maxPayload}, #{maxAltitude}, #{maxFlightTime}, #{maxSpeed}, #{wingspan}, #{weight}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{aiGenerated}, #{deleted})
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_uav SET deleted=1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_uav WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0

SELECT * FROM t_uav
deleted = 0
AND (instr(uav_code, #{keyword}) > 0 OR instr(model, #{keyword}) > 0 OR instr(manufacturer, #{keyword}) > 0 OR instr(id || '', #{keyword}) > 0)
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_uav WHERE uav_code = #{uavCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_uav WHERE uav_code = #{uavCode} AND deleted = 0 AND id != #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_uav WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_uav WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
